title: feathers biomes
description: This datapack makes chickens in each biome drop feathers with colors and styles that match their natural environment.
body: This datapack adds variety to the world by making chickens drop different types of feathers depending on their biome. Chickens from cold, warm, and temperate biomes each drop unique feathers that reflect their environment, adding a more realistic and decorative touch to the game. Perfect for collectors or players who enjoy the small details that make every Minecraft region feel more alive and distinctive.
